setup_instructions.1: 创建GCP Storage Bucket: gsutil mb gs://grace-irvine-templates
setup_instructions.2: 设置公共读取权限: gsutil iam ch allUsers:objectViewer gs://grace-irvine-templates
setup_instructions.3: 上传初始模板: gsutil cp templates/dynamic_templates.json gs://grace-irvine-templates/templates/
setup_instructions.4: 在Cloud Run中设置环境变量: GCP_TEMPLATE_BUCKET=grace-irvine-templates
